creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
Paul, You failed to mention in your PR whereabouts CDE is mentioned in FreeBSD's documentation. I had to grep through /usr/www and /usr/doc to find it was mentioned in the FAQ. Next time you submit a bug report, please give some relevant information to help solve the problem. The patch below may be used to close this PR. Regards, Tom --- FAQ/commercial.sgml.orig Sat Aug 8 18:53:28 1998 +++ FAQ/commercial.sgml Sun Mar 21 12:42:45 1999 @@ -42,11 +42,11 @@ Where can I get CDE for FreeBSD? -

Contact for a CDE 1.0.10 - distribution for FreeBSD. This includes Motif 1.2.5, and can - be used with Motif 2.0. +

used to sell CDE for + FreeBSD, but no longer do. -

This is a unified CDROM distribution for FreeBSD and Linux. +

is an open source + X11 desktop which is similar to CDE in many respects.
